# createOrgApiKey

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the createOrgApiKey mutation

## Usage

```typescript
db.mutation.createOrgApiKey({ input: '<CreateOrgApiKeyInput>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run createOrgApiKey

```typescript
const result = await db.mutation.createOrgApiKey({ input: '<CreateOrgApiKeyInput>' }).execute();
```
